description_long: This is a vintage-style film projector, predominantly constructed from dark metal with a boxy main body and two large, circular film reels mounted on the front and rear. The front face features a vertical ribbed panel with the word 'KEYSTONE' embossed, suggesting a classic or retro design. The reels have multiple circular cutouts and are connected by a visible armature, with a central lens protruding from the body. The base is wide and flat, providing stability, and there are several mechanical knobs and gears visible on the side, indicating manual operation. The overall appearance is industrial and robust, with a matte metallic finish and subtle wear that adds to its authenticity.
description: A vintage, dark metal film projector with two large perforated reels, a ribbed front panel labeled 'KEYSTONE', and visible mechanical components. The design is industrial and robust, with a matte metallic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ribbed panel with 'KEYSTONE', the central lens, and both large film reels prominently.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the projector, with both reels aligned and the lens barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the reels, the connecting armature, and the flat base, with the ribbed panel partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid side of the main body and the edge of the top reel, with minimal detail.
attribute_brand_logo: The brand name 'KEYSTONE' is embossed in white capital letters on the front ribbed panel of the projector, centered and clearly visible.
attribute_lens_type: fixed lens, medium size, cylindrical, protruding from the front panel with no visible adjustment rings.
attribute_control_panel_design: No distinct control panel is visible; possible manual controls are limited to mechanical knobs and buttons on the side.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Vertical slats are present on the front right side of the main body, forming a rectangular vent pattern for airflow.
